title: Kinemon Reaches the Others
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on kinemon reaches the others within the Take Me With You storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...This is a "political marriage"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Everyone who sails beneath Mama must have their "bloodlines" tied.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...In other words, this marriage is a ceremony...

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: to unite the bloodlines of the Vinsmoke and the Charlotte families.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It has nothing to do with gaining a connection to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: shall i put it even simpler for you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...The instant this marriage is completed ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: "Black leg" Sanji will no longer be a part of your crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You can't just decide that crap on your own!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: SANJI IS MY CREW- MATE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Ghh... but even before that, he was a son of the Vinsmoke family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't take it out on me!!! GAO!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: There's no way that Sanji wouldn't refuse that marriage then!!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: ...right before the eyes of Mama... and the brutal Vinsmoke family...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I wonder... If he'll be to refuse... and still keep his life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What was that-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Damn it, Pekoma- Mushi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What are you gonna do now then ....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...As soon as I heal, I'm going to go back.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: That little brat bege tried to kill me. I'm not gonna let it end just like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then take me with you !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nami!! I'm going alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Just like Robin and the others said, if we all go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We could risk starting a war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And this isn't the time for that right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As long as it's just me and this guy...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: I might be able to sneak into the tea party and ruin the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Get real!! You're expecting me to bring an enemy home with me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAAH.... that sounds like fun....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: carrot, this isn't a game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Alright, then it's decided!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll go get chopper!! Hurry up and get better!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't go deciding on your o... OWowie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Owow Oww....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hold your horses, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Zoro! You were here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you hear all that just now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I did.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're probably...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: All worried about Sanji! Aren'tcha?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shishi Shi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't make me kick your ass.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I told you to leave that idiot alone.

summary: Kinemon Reaches the Others: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
